name: iris
description: AI analysis report layer for polished editorial HTML artifacts.

interface.shortDescription: Turn AI analysis into editorial reading reports.
interface.longDescription: Iris turns AI analysis, summaries, research notes, codebase readings, strategy judgments, and technical explanations into polished single-page HTML reports with premium editorial typography, key findings, evidence diagrams, assumptions, and next actions.
defaultPrompt: Use Iris to turn this AI analysis into a polished reading report.
Use Iris to render this codebase analysis as an editorial report.
Use Iris to turn these research notes into a readable evidence report.
